verified.name: Minecraft Server Status
verified.tagline: Ping any Minecraft server for its MOTD, players, and version
verified.description: Point it at a server host and it pings live for online status, player counts, MOTD, version, and icon. Supports both Java and Bedrock servers, with per-host caching so repeat lookups stay quick. No key, JSON out, and CORS wide open.
verified.rateLimit: Responses cached per host (~1 min); no published request cap

verified.name: MMO Games
verified.tagline: Browse free-to-play MMO games, news, and giveaways as JSON
verified.description: A catalog of free-to-play titles from MMOBomb, filterable by genre and platform, alongside news and active giveaways. Each game entry carries a thumbnail, short blurb, publisher, and store link. Keyless GET, no signup required.

verified.name: Open Trivia
verified.tagline: Pull random trivia questions across categories and difficulties
verified.description: Fetch multiple-choice or true/false trivia questions filtered by category, difficulty, and type. Each result ships with the correct answer plus shuffled distractors, ready to drop straight into a quiz. Content is licensed CC BY-SA 4.0.

results.question: What is the opening track on Lorde's Pure Heroine?

verified.rateLimit: One request per IP every 5 seconds (documented)

verified.name: PlayerDB
verified.tagline: Resolve Minecraft, Steam, and Xbox player profiles by name or ID
verified.description: Look up a player across Minecraft, Steam, or Xbox and get back canonical IDs, avatars, and profile metadata. Handy for turning a username into a stable UUID or grabbing a skin texture. No key needed, JSON response, open CORS.

sampleJson.message: Successfully found player by given ID.

verified.name: Pokémon TCG
verified.tagline: Query Pokémon trading-card data — sets, cards, prices, and images
verified.description: Search the Pokémon Trading Card Game catalog by card, set, type, and more, with images and market prices attached. It works without a key at a lower rate limit; a free key raises the ceiling. All Pokémon intellectual property belongs to its owners.
verified.freeTier: Free; no key ~1,000 req/day & 30/min, free key ~20,000 req/day (documented)
verified.notes: First (cold) probe timed out; a second attempt returned 200 in ~5.7s.

verified.name: Raider
verified.tagline: World of Warcraft Mythic+ and raid rankings for characters & guilds
verified.description: Pull WoW character and guild profiles, Mythic+ scores, raid progress, and the current season's affix rotation. Public data is available without a key over plain JSON. The underlying game data is Blizzard's.

sampleJson.title: Xal'atath's Bargain: Devour, Fortified, Tyrannical, Xal'atath's Guile

affix_details.name: Xal'atath's Bargain: Devour
affix_details.description: While in combat, Xal'atath tears open rifts that devour the essence of players.

verified.freeTier: Free, no API key for public data

verified.name: RuneScape
verified.tagline: Official RuneScape Grand Exchange item prices and trends
verified.description: Jagex's Grand Exchange catalogue endpoint returns an item's current price, 30/90/180-day trends, image, and category. It answers JSON (despite a text/html content type) with no key required. RuneScape data is © Jagex.
verified.notes: Body is valid JSON but served with a text/html content-type.

verified.name: TETR.IO
verified.tagline: Stats and player data from the TETR.IO Tetra Channel API
verified.description: The Tetra Channel API exposes TETR.IO's public numbers — global user counts, games played, and per-player records. Responses ship with cache windows the docs ask you to honor. Note the CORS header only allows tetr.io itself, so browser calls from other origins are blocked.
verified.rateLimit: Honor server-provided cache expiry (~60s); docs require caching
verified.notes: access-control-allow-origin is fixed to https://tetr.io, so cross-origin browser use is blocked.

verified.name: Valorant (non-official)
verified.tagline: Community API for Valorant agents, weapons, maps, and assets
verified.description: A fan-maintained catalog of Valorant in-game content — agents, weapons, skins, maps, sprays — each with artwork and multi-language text. Keyless JSON with wide-open CORS. Not affiliated with Riot; all assets remain Riot's.

data.description: Gekko the Angeleno leads a tight-knit crew of calamitous creatures.

verified.name: When is next MCU film
verified.tagline: Countdown to the next Marvel Cinematic Universe release
verified.description: Returns the next MCU movie or show with a days-until countdown, overview, poster, and the following production in the pipeline. Data is sourced from TMDB and served as plain JSON. No key, no signup.

verified.name: xkcd
verified.tagline: Fetch xkcd comics as JSON — latest or by number
verified.description: Grab any xkcd comic's metadata — title, image URL, alt text, and publish date — as a tidy JSON object. Hit info.0.json for the newest strip or /{num}/info.0.json for a specific one. Comics are licensed CC BY-NC, so commercial reuse is not permitted.

sampleJson.title: Types of Tornado Alert
sampleJson.alt: I hate the unearthly sound my phone makes when the weather service issues a tornado harbinger.

verified.name: Yu-Gi-Oh!
verified.tagline: Search Yu-Gi-Oh! cards with stats, sets, prices, and art
verified.description: Query the YGOPRODeck database by card name or filters and get full card details — type, ATK/DEF, archetype, set printings, and market prices. Keyless JSON with permissive CORS. Yu-Gi-Oh! is Konami's property.

verified.name: adresse.data.gouv.fr
verified.tagline: Geocode and reverse-geocode French addresses (Base Adresse Nationale)
verified.description: France's national address geocoder turns a query string into ranked GeoJSON matches with coordinates, postcode, and city — reverse lookups too. It's fast, keyless, and CORS-enabled, documented at 50 requests per second per IP. Data ships under open French licences.

verified.name: BdAPIs
verified.tagline: Divisions, districts, and upazilas of Bangladesh as JSON
verified.description: A tidy reference API for Bangladesh's administrative geography — divisions down to districts and upazilas — each with Bangla names and coordinates. Keyless GET with open CORS. Handy for dropdowns and location pickers.

verified.name: Cartes.io
verified.tagline: Create and read open collaborative maps and markers
verified.description: An open-source mapping service where anyone can spin up public maps and drop markers, all reachable over a REST API. Listing maps is a keyless GET — just send Accept: application/json, or you get the web app's HTML instead. CORS is enabled.
verified.freeTier: Free, no API key for public read
verified.notes: Requires Accept: application/json; otherwise the endpoint returns the SPA HTML.

verified.name: GeoApi
verified.tagline: French administrative geography — communes, departments, regions
verified.description: The French government's Découpage Administratif API resolves communes, departments, and regions by name, code, or postcode, with population and INSEE codes attached. Keyless JSON, CORS-friendly, backed by official open data. Ideal for French address and territory lookups.

verified.name: Steam
verified.tagline: Undocumented Steam storefront lookups — app details by ID
verified.description: Steam's internal storefront endpoint returns rich details for any app by ID: name, type, pricing, free-to-play flag, descriptions, and media. It's undocumented and keyless but IP-rate-limited, so cache and go easy. No CORS header is sent, so use it server-side.

data.name: Dota 2
data.short_description: Every day, millions of players worldwide enter battle as one of over a hundred Dota heroes.

verified.notes: Undocumented internal Steam storefront endpoint; no CORS header.

skipped.name: Sakura CardCaptor
skipped.reason: Backing Heroku app (protected-taiga-89091.herokuapp.com) returns 404 — free Heroku dynos were retired, API is dead.

skipped.name: Warface (non-official)
skipped.reason: api.wfstats.cf root returns the site's HTML app, not JSON; no documented keyless JSON endpoint found (freenom .cf domain).

skipped.name: Tronald Dump
skipped.reason: API host api.tronalddump.io no longer resolves (DNS dead); www.tronalddump.io/random/quote returns 404.

skipped.name: Geocode.xyz
skipped.reason: Anonymous requests are throttled — returns 200 but every field is a 'Throttled! See geocode.xyz/pricing' placeholder, no real geocoding data without a paid token.

skipped.name: CitySDK
skipped.reason: citysdk.eu is a marketing/informational site; no live keyless JSON API endpoint reachable.

skipped.name: Ducks Unlimited
skipped.reason: Dataset page is a JS-rendered ArcGIS Hub UI; no direct keyless JSON query endpoint locatable within the attempt budget.

skipped.name: Graph Countries
skipped.reason: GraphQL host (countries-274616.ew.r.appspot.com) returns 503 — dead App Engine app; also GraphQL requires POST, no keyless JSON GET.
